Class RecipeBookMenu

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.gui.RecipeBookMenu
public final class RecipeBookMenu extends Object
Builds and opens the paginated recipe book GUI.

Layout (6-row chest, 54 slots):

  Rows 0-4 (slots 0-44): recipe entries, PAGE_SIZE per page
  Row 5   (slots 45-53): filler, with prev/info/next at slots 48/49/50

An entry is locked until the player has cooked it at least once; locked entries show a gray glass pane named ??? with only the ingredient list. Unlocked entries display the output item with cook time, ingredients, and — for recipes with quality-bonus: true (the default) — mastery progress in the lore.

  • Constructor Details

    • RecipeBookMenu

      public RecipeBookMenu(List<CookingRecipe> recipes, CookingConfig config, MasteryAccessor masteryAccessor)
      Parameters:
      recipes - all loaded cooking recipes
      config - core cooking config, used for the mastery threshold
      masteryAccessor - sync accessor for per-player cook counts

  • Method Details

    • open

      public void open(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, int page)
      Opens the recipe book at the given page for the player. Reads mastery counts from the in-memory cache; no async required.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to open the book for
      page - the page number to display (clamped to valid range)

    • reload

      public void reload(List<CookingRecipe> recipes, CookingConfig config)
      Updates the recipe list and config after a plugin reload.
      Parameters:
      recipes - the reloaded recipe list
      config - the reloaded core config
